creator: wollman@FreeBSD.org
text:
devel/icu/distinfo says:

TIMESTAMP = 1702333661
SHA256 (icu4c-74_2-src.tgz) = 5e4fb11d6a3e6b85afb55de8da8a71538f1d8fd64fce893986b37d60e5bb0091
SIZE (icu4c-74_2-src.tgz) = 26618071

However, a fresh download of icu4c-74_2-src.tgz from GutHub, which appears to be the official location, reports:

SHA256 (icu4c-74_2-src.tgz) = 68db082212a96d6f53e35d60f47d38b962e9f9d207a74cfac78029ae8ff5e08c

and size 26529443.  I have an older copy on a different builder that has the expected checksum and size so it appears to have changed on GitHub.
